title: Regolamenti dwar Accountancy Profession (General Accounting Principles in respect of certain Eligible Entities related to the business of Insurance)

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
ACCOUNTANCY PROFESSION (GENERAL ACCOUNTING
PRINCIPLES IN RESPECT OF CERTAIN ELIGIBLE
ENTITIES RELATED TO THE BUSINESS OF INSURANCE)

[ L.S. 281.07

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 281.07
REGOLAMENTI DWAR ACCOUNTANCY
PROFESSION (GENERAL ACCOUNTING
PRINCIPLES IN RESPECT OF CERTAIN ELIGIBLE
ENTITIES RELATED TO THE BUSINESS OF
INSURANCE)
1 ta’ Jannar, 2023
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 299 tal-2023, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 299 tal-2025*.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*These regulations shall apply to financial reporting periods commencing on or after
1st January 2025. Vide regulation 1(2) of Legal Notice 299 of 2025.

1
